scenarios.name: equivalent_concurrent_requests
scenarios.coverage: Two equivalent validation requests race to persist the same proof cache key and converge to one stored entry.

scenarios.name: changed_input_digest_miss
scenarios.coverage: A changed validation input digest produces a different cache key, records a miss, and then accepts a new proof entry.

scenarios.name: stale_receipt_readiness_closeout
scenarios.coverage: A stale receipt is rejected by proof status construction and is reported in readiness and closeout output.

scenarios.name: corrupted_cache_metadata
scenarios.coverage: Corrupted or invalidated cache metadata fails closed and renders a repair-cache action.

scenarios.name: quota_gc_preserves_active_artifacts
scenarios.coverage: Quota planning removes old entries from the retained set while preserving active bead entry and receipt artifacts.

scenarios.name: structured_log_contract
scenarios.coverage: Each proof-cache harness event is newline-delimited JSON with trace_id, cache_key, decision, reason_code, receipt_path, producer_agent, and bead_id.
